# Endor Labs Agent Kit Plugin Packages

<!-- Generated by Endor Labs Agent Kit. Do not hand-edit. -->

This directory contains generated plugin package artifacts. Generate or
refresh them with:

```bash
endor-agent-kit publish source/agents/*/recipe.yaml --dest . --prune --include-plugins
```

Current generated package slice:

- `codex/endor-labs-agent-kit/`: Codex plugin package with setup skill,
  Codex workflow skills, bundled custom-agent TOML files, installer script,
  and local marketplace metadata under `codex/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json`.

Claude Code and Gemini plugin packages are planned release-critical hosts
but are not generated by the first Codex implementation slice.
